chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/308)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/308)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) لَهُ خُئُولَةٌ فِي بَنِي مَخْزُومٍ وَ إِنَّ شَابّاً مِنْهُمْ أَتَاهُ فَقَالَ يَا خَالِي إِنَّ أَخِي مَاتَ وَ قَدْ حَزِنْتُ عَلَيْهِ حُزْناً شَدِيداً قَالَ فَقَالَ لَهُ تَشْتَهِي أَنْ تَرَاهُ قَالَ بَلَى قَالَ فَأَرِنِي قَبْرَهُ

قَالَ فَخَرَجَ وَ مَعَهُ بُرْدَةُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مُتَّزِراً بِهَا فَلَمَّا انْتَهَى إِلَى الْقَبْرِ تَلَمْلَمَتْ شَفَتَاهُ ثُمَّ رَكَضَهُ بِرِجْلِهِ فَخَرَجَ مِنْ قَبْرِهِ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ بِلِسَانِ الْفُرْسِ فَقَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) أَ لَمْ تَمُتْ وَ أَنْتَ رَجُلٌ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ قَالَ بَلَى وَ لَكِنَّا مِتْنَا عَلَى سُنَّةِ فُلَانٍ وَ فُلَانٍ فَانْقَلَبَتْ أَلْسِنَتُنَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Al Qasim, from Isa Shalqan who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> had a maternal uncle for him<sup>asws</sup> among the Clan of Makhzoum, and a youth from them came over to him<sup>asws</sup>. So he said, ‘O my maternal uncle! My brother died and I am in grief over him with intense grief’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do you crave to see him?’ He said, ‘Yes’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So show me<sup>asws</sup> his grave’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So he<sup>asws</sup> went out and with him<sup>asws</sup> was a cloak of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> being girded with it. So when he<sup>asws</sup> ended up to the grave, he<sup>asws</sup> moved his<sup>asws</sup> lips, then kicked it with his<sup>asws</sup> left. So he came out from his grave and he was saying (something) in the Persian language. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Did you not die and you were a man from the Arabs?’ He said, ‘Yes, but we died upon the Sunnah of so and so, and so and so, so our language changed’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad from ‘Abdallah ibn Sinan who has said the following. “Once ‘Umar ibn yazid came to me and said, “Ride with us and rode with them and went until we came to the house of Hafs al-Kunasi. He took him also with us and we continued the journey until we arrived at al-Ghari and to the grave. He said, “dismount, this is the grave of Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.).” We asked him, “How did you find out?” He said, “I have come here several times with abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) when he was in al-Hira and he told me that this is his (Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) grave.”
